ShopLookbookAbout
MAISON

Est. 2020 · New Delhi, India

Crafted with
Intention

Our Story

Born from a belief that luxury is not excess — it is precision.

MAISON was founded in 2020 in New Delhi with a singular vision: to create fashion that speaks through restraint. In a world of excess, we chose silence — clean lines, deliberate cuts, and materials chosen for their soul.

Every piece in our collection begins with a question: does this need to exist? Only when the answer is a resounding yes do our designers begin the long, obsessive process of bringing it to life.

We believe the most powerful statement a person can make is one of quiet confidence. Our clothes, handbags, and accessories are made for those who understand this.

What We Stand For

Our Values

01

Intentional Design

Every stitch, seam, and silhouette is deliberate. We remove until nothing is left to remove — only then is a piece ready.

02

Ethical Craftsmanship

We partner with artisan workshops across India who share our commitment to fair wages, safe conditions, and traditional craft.

03

Sustainable Luxury

We use natural, sustainable fabrics — organic cotton, linen, silk, and ethically sourced leather. Luxury that doesn't cost the earth.

04

Timeless Over Trendy

We don't follow seasons. We create pieces designed to last a decade, not a month. Buy less, choose well.

05

Inclusive Sizing

MAISON is made for every body. Our collections range from XS to 3XL with the same attention to fit and finish.

06

Transparent Pricing

We price honestly. No inflated markups, no false sales. Every rupee reflects the true cost of quality.

How We Work

From Concept to Closet

1

Design

Our designers sketch by hand. Every collection starts with paper, not a screen.

2

Material

We source sustainable fabrics from certified mills across India and Europe.

3

Craft

Skilled artisans bring each piece to life in our partner workshops in Delhi and Jaipur.

4

Quality Check

Every single piece passes a 47-point quality inspection before it reaches you.

2020

Year Founded

12,000+

Happy Customers

340+

Curated Pieces

18

Countries Shipped

The People

Meet Our Team

Founder & Creative Director

Arjun Mehta

Former fashion editor turned founder. Arjun spent 10 years at Vogue India before launching MAISON with a vision for quiet luxury.

Head of Design

Priya Sharma

Trained at NID Ahmedabad, Priya brings an architect's precision to fashion. She believes clothes should be as structural as they are beautiful.

Head of Sustainability

Rohit Kapoor

Rohit ensures every decision at MAISON considers its impact on people and planet. He oversees our supply chain from seed to store.

Our Commitment

Fashion that doesn't cost the earth

100% natural and sustainable fabrics

Carbon neutral shipping by 2025

Zero plastic packaging

Fair wages for all artisan partners

1% of revenue to environmental causes

Take-back program for old MAISON pieces

Ready to explore?

Discover the Collection

Every piece tells a story. Find yours in our curated collection of clothes, handbags, and accessories.
